heroSubtitle: Answers to common questions about our services, process and how we work

faqs.question: How do we begin working with OBH?
faqs.answer: It starts with a free consultation. We'll discuss your business challenges, goals and current technology setup. From there, we'll propose a tailored solution with a clear roadmap and cost estimate — no obligation.

faqs.question: Is the initial consultation really free?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely. We offer a free discovery consultation where we analyse your existing workflows, identify pain points and discuss how technology can help. There's no sales pressure — just honest advice.

faqs.question: How long does a typical project take?
faqs.answer: It depends on scope and complexity. A focused web project might take 4-8 weeks, while a complex custom software platform could take 3-6 months. We'll give you a clear timeline during the proposal phase and keep you updated throughout development.

faqs.question: Do you work with startups or only established businesses?
faqs.answer: We work with businesses of all sizes — from startups looking to build their first product to established companies needing to modernise their operations. Our approach scales to match your needs and budget.

faqs.question: What technologies do you use?
faqs.answer: We choose the best technology for each project rather than forcing a one-size-fits-all approach. Our team is experienced with modern web frameworks (React, Node.js, Python), cloud platforms (AWS, Azure), mobile development, AI/ML tools and more. We'll recommend the right stack for your specific needs.

faqs.question: Can you integrate with our existing systems?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialise in building solutions that work seamlessly with your existing CRM, ERP, BIM, project management and other business tools. Integration planning is a core part of our proposal phase.

faqs.question: What is your development methodology?
faqs.answer: We follow agile methodologies with regular sprint cycles, demos and feedback sessions. This means you see progress throughout the project, can provide feedback early and get a solution that truly matches your needs.

faqs.question: Do you provide ongoing support after launch?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our relationship doesn't end at deployment. We offer long-term support, maintenance and feature updates. Many of our clients continue working with us on a retainer basis as their needs evolve.

faqs.question: How is pricing structured?
faqs.answer: We offer both project-based pricing and retainer partnerships. Project-based work has a defined scope and fixed cost. Retainers provide ongoing development hours at a predictable monthly rate. We'll recommend the best model for your situation.

faqs.question: Do you offer fixed-price projects?
faqs.answer: Yes, for well-defined projects we can provide fixed-price proposals after the discovery phase. This gives you budget certainty while ensuring we deliver everything agreed upon.

faqs.question: What happens if the scope changes during a project?
faqs.answer: Change is natural in software development. We handle scope changes transparently — any adjustments are discussed, estimated and agreed before implementation. Our agile approach means we can adapt to evolving requirements without derailing the project.

faqs.question: Can we start with a small project to test the relationship?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Many of our long-term partnerships started with a single focused project. Starting small lets you experience our process and quality firsthand before committing to larger engagements.

faqs.question: What industries do you specialise in?
faqs.answer: We have deep expertise in transport and logistics, construction and sustainability. We've built platforms like Quantum Mechanics (fleet management), Ascert Pro (BCAR inspections) and ECOnstruction (sustainable construction). We also work across other sectors where our approach adds value.

faqs.question: Can you help with regulatory compliance?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our construction and transport solutions are built with compliance at their core — from BCAR regulations to HGV inspection requirements. We ensure our platforms keep you ahead of regulatory demands.

faqs.question: Do you have experience with sustainability-focused projects?
faqs.answer: Sustainability is central to our mission. Our ECOnstruction platform demonstrates how we help businesses adopt eco-friendly practices while remaining financially viable. We believe technology should drive sustainable outcomes.

faqs.question: Who are the founders?
faqs.answer: OBH was founded by Ethan O'Brien and Sarah Jane Hughes, both Electronic & Computer Engineering students at the University of Galway and Stanford University Innovation Fellows. They bring a unique combination of technical expertise, design thinking and entrepreneurial vision.

faqs.question: What makes OBH different from other software consultancies?
faqs.answer: Three things: our design-thinking approach ensures solutions are human-centred; our Stanford Innovation Fellowship background brings a unique problem-solving methodology; and our industry-specific expertise means we don't just write code — we understand your business challenges.

faqs.question: Where are you based?
faqs.answer: We're based at the University of Galway, Ireland. We work with clients across Ireland and beyond, with the ability to collaborate both remotely and on-site as needed.

cta.title: Still Have Questions?
cta.description: We're happy to chat through any questions not covered here. No pressure, no sales pitch — just honest answers about how we can help.
